title: Lesson 233: (Grammar) - to become; to get; to grow; to be; to reach; to at...

intro_cards.title: To Become: なる
intro_cards.body:
なる means 'to become' or 'to change into a state.'

With い-adjectives: [く form] + なる
• 大きくなる (become big/grow)
• 暖かくなりました。(It became warm.)

With な-adjectives/nouns: [な-adj/noun] + に + なる
• 元気になった。(Became well / recovered.)
• 先生になりたい。(I want to become a teacher.)

With verb + ようになる = 'come to (be able to)':
• 泳げるようになった。(I came to be able to swim.)

なる vs にする:
• なる = become (natural/unintentional change)
• にする = make / decide (deliberate)
